_description: Feature flag registry. Every boolean behaviour toggle in the pipeline is declared here with owner, default, env var, and a short description. New flags MUST be added here before being referenced in code so the operator-visible surface stays in one place.
_resolution_order: Env var (if env_var is set in the entry and the env var is defined)

use_own_llm.description: Use the project's own LLM key for baseline code generation instead of the MCP server's generator. When disabled, all generation goes through the MCP /generate endpoint.

use_retrieve_on_llm_fail.description: Stage 3 context enrichment via MCP /retrieve when the LLM fix loop fails. Disables an MCP round trip when off.

decompose_on_llm_fail.description: Run LLM task-decomposition before regeneration when prior stages have failed. Off by default — adds latency, only useful for very long prompts.

final_llm_after_regen_fail.description: Stage 5 final LLM recovery — one last LLM fix attempt if regeneration produced no compiling code.

auto_learn_on_success.description: Learn reusable fix rules from mid-pipeline successful fixes (AutoLearner). Disabling stops the feedback loop into resources/auto_fixes.json.

auto_learn_catalog.description: Also auto-expand the error catalog when learning from successes. Independent of auto_learn_on_success — both must be on for catalog growth.

learn_rules_from_failures.description: EXPERIMENTAL — extract candidate rules from failed-task patterns. Off by default; the post-pipeline learning loop is the supported path.

update_agents_md.description: Generate and stage per-category agents.md sidecar files alongside each batch commit.

resume_batch.description: On batch restart, skip tasks that already passed on disk and re-commit their saved .cs files.

reporting_enabled.description: Master switch for the usage reporter. Off → no JSONL log, no remote POST.

reporting_log_to_file.description: Write each usage report to results/usage_reports.jsonl for local inspection.
